about.title: About
about.text1: DRS is a team of passionate engineers who love to create and develop innovative products. We offer digital services ranging from simple applications to complex enterprise web systems. If you're interested in collaboration, one of our products, or a partnership, feel free to reach out!
about.text3: Our mission is to build digital products that deliver real, measurable value to our clients. Looking ahead, we plan to expand into IoT, robotics, and industrial automation — bringing modern technology to businesses that don't yet know they need it.

mateo.name: Mateo Keretić
mateo.tech2: Full-stack engineer specializing in enterprise web systems, with a focus on backend architecture and modern frontend frameworks.

damian.name: Damian Keretić
damian.tech2: Mechatronics and robotics engineer driving the digital transformation of manufacturing businesses through custom software and process automation.

products.title: Products
products.text111: Working closely with project-oriented companies and small to medium-sized manufacturers, we identified a clear gap: existing solutions lacked the simplicity and precision that modern businesses require. Both products are fully customizable and scalable to your specific needs.
products.usluge2: Access via computers, tablets, and phones
products.usluge5: Project management — tasks, deadlines, Kanban board, visual timelines, and communication
products.usluge6: Work hours, expense, and client tracking
products.usluge8: Rapid invoice entry via OCR scanning
products.usluge9: HR module — vacations, business trips, and attendance
products.usluge10: And much more — customizable and scalable to your needs
products.usluge20: Management software for small and medium-sized production companies
products.usluge22: Access via computers, tablets, and phones
products.usluge25: Progress & expense tracking per work order
products.usluge28: Standalone or integrated with your existing ERP
products.usluge29: Direct interaction with factory floor workers via computers, tablets, or phones
products.usluge30: And much more — customizable and scalable to your needs
